question: Which year from 2011-2016 has the lowest teen birth rate for females ages 15-19 across all races in the United States? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A public health student wants the lowest teen birth rate year in the early 2010s.

1.fact: Filtering to Race or Hispanic Origin = "All Races" and Age Group = "15-19 Years" for 2011-2016, the minimum Birth Rate is 20.3 in 2016.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2011-2016 has the lowest teen birth rate for females ages 15-19 across all races in the United States? (Filter Race or Hispanic Origin == "All Races" and Age Group == "15-19 Years"; select the minimum Birth Rate.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which year from 2011-2016 has the lowest teen birth rate for ages 15-19 across all races? (Filter Race or Hispanic Origin == "All Races" and Age Group == "15-19 Years"; select the minimum Birth Rate.) The answer is 2016.
